responses.title: Let's have some fun, shall we...
Mireska is here.
Are you ready to have some fun, ya?
Whaddya say Jex, you ready to play?
Whaddaya waiting for? We have some gold to steal.
Let's get into some mischief, shall we?
They're not ready for what I have planned...
Jex... are you ready for shenanigans?
Mireska has arrived.
No one will forget the name Mireska
The Sylph is here!
Let's have some fun, shall we...
I'm full of surprises...
I can take care of myself...
Let's see what we can take now....
It's not wise to stand in my way...
Mireska has arrived.
Ugh!
They're not ready for what I have planned...
Jex... are you ready for shenanigans?
Let's have some fun, shall we...
These marks won't know what hit 'em...
God I'm going to enjoy this...
Time to take what I want...
We're going to have some fun Jex...
Never been stopped before, not gonna start now...
Come my little wisp...it's playtime.
I'm wanted in 6 nations... you think a glowing rock is going to stop me?
It's not wise to stand in my way...
I don't take pleasure in violence, but no one gets between me and my desires.
I'm full of surprises...
My family will never forget my name...
I almost feel sorry for what's about to happen...almost.
I can feel it already, this is gonna be exciting...
Mireska has arrived.
No one will forget the name Mireska
This'll be like stealing candy from a- Well stealing from anyone really, I'm pretty amazing.
This one's in the bag.
In the bag. Stole the bag. My bag.
Come on Jex, we have work to do.
Ohhhh I have chills...
I don't need a horn to tell me when to fight.
Let's go Jex...
Time to move.
Time to get into trouble...
A little mischief never killed anyone...
Moving..
On my way.
You ready for shenanigans?
I'm going.
My time has come...
What are we waiting for...
Come on, Jex!
I'll prove I'm the best..
I'm always on the move...
Can't stay in one place too long...
The sooner we're outta here the better...
Let's get moving...
Here we go...
No time to dilly dally...
Let's fly...
Gotta go...
Mischief awaits...
Time to be trouble...
Can't stay here...
Eheheheh huhum.
Let's see where the road takes us...
Let's find something to steal...
We're going on a little field trip Jex...
This place was boring anyway...
Let's go Jex...
Time to move.
Time to get into trouble...
Moving..
Let's get outta here...
You ready for shenanigans?
What are we waiting for...
Can't stay in one place too long...
Here we go...
No time to dilly dally...
They're on to us, let's go...
Let's fly...
Gotta go...
Time to be trouble...
Can't stay here...
Let's find something to steal...
I'm going.
Come on, Jex!
I'll prove I'm the best..
I'm always on the move...
Let's get moving...
Let's see where the road takes us...
Mischief awaits...
On my way.
We're going on a little fieldtrip Jex...
This place was boring anyway...
A little mischief never killed anyone...
The sooner we're outta here the better...
My time has come...
You're mine!
I can take care of myself...
You think I don't know how to fight?
You're not walking away...
It's you or me...
Wait your turn Jex...
This one's mine Jex...
I won't let you stop me...
You shoulda walked away...
I'm gonna have fun with you...
This is where ya die...
Run.
You should run while you can...
No one can stop us...
I'm untouchable....
Nothing can stand in our way...
Huh!
Ya!
Ha!
Da!
Ha ya!
Hht!
Ay-a!
Hu-ah!
Ha!
Hu!
Ha!

Ha!
Ah!
Ya!
Huu yah!
Huh yah!
Ha-tya!
Hya-ga!
Ha-dya!
Haa-dya!
Huu-dya!
Hu-dah!
Hu ah!
Showtime...
You're not ready for this...
I'm full of surprises...
Stick around...
You're not going anywhere...
Not so fast...
Hahahahahah eheh.
This'll be fun to watch.
You're going to die slowly...
Let's see you try to escape...
Enjoy...
A gift from me to you...
Don't take too much time...
Time isn't on your side...
You want me, come get me...
This isn't going to end well for you...
Let's get outta here...
They're on to us, let's go...
Now you see me...
Time to regroup...
Get ready for a surprise...
I got a few tricks up my sleeve...
Hahahahaha heh.
I'm gonna find you....
Retreat to shadows...
The shadows will protect me...
I disappear...
You'll see me again soon...
Time to get outta here...
Jex, whaddya say we go introduce ourselves...
I take what I want, and what I want now is your life.
You're gonna love this...
You should have ran...
Gotcha!
The ley lines call to me...
Tick tock...
I have you right where I want you.
I have you now...
I don't think so!
You're in my dominion...
You couldn't begin to understand the power I wield
You're on borrowed time.
I'd run if I were you.
You're on the clock, love...
Jex, protect me!
Alright little wisp, do your thing.
You shouldn't have made my friend angry.
You're all dead.
You're all about to die.
Jex, this one's all you.
I have a surprise for you.
Alright Jex... go have some fun.
You thought you were winning?
We're a helluva team Jex, aren't we
Get to work Jex!
Spread terror, Jex
Our enemies will run before us.
I'll show you something to be afraid of.
Have you met my friend Jex yet?
Yes!
We did it Jex!
The more power the better...
Let's see what we can take now....
No one can stop us!
Let's start some shenanigans, Jex
I think a little mischief's in order...
Good work Jex!
The world will remember the name Mireska!
I forge my own destiny...
A little mischief never killed anyone... well, you I guess.
Stay down...
That's what you get...
Shoulda just let me have my fun...
Tsk tsk tsk...
Never had a chance...
The Jasper Circle couldn't do it better...
It was never going to end well for you...
No one stands in my way!
What, you thought you would win?
Oh we're just getting started...
Only way this was gonna play out...
Hahahaha!
Hahahaha!
Hah haha!
Huh huh huh huh!
Haha ha hahaha!
Ha ha ha haha!
Ah haha haha ha!
Hahaha hahahaha!
Hahahaha hahahahahaa!
Ha ha ha ha ha ha haa!
Haa hahahahahaha!
Ahhhahahahahaha!
I suppose murder's not an honest living, but it pays the bills
Hahahaha ah hahahaha ahh hahahaha!
Huh huh haha ahhaha ahhahahaha!
I'll steal the mist of Avernus for myself...
You shouldn't be carrying all that money around, Alchemist...
Shame you picked the wrong side, Alchemist.
You never should have stuck your nose in my business, Kaldr!
You should have stuck with punching Invoker!
I wasn't sure someone could annoy me more than Donté, but then you had to go talking in the third person.
Be grateful that I found you before Sorla did.
Aw face it Axe, you're nothing more than a dumb brute.
I'm not scared of you, Bane...
I'm putting you to sleep, Bane.
Awww you got a lasso! That's adorable.
You and your little pet should have stayed in the jungle.
Your pet has nothing on mine...
I've been hunted by better.
You're an abomination, Bloodseeker.
You're never cashing in that bounty...
You're good at your job Brewmaster. Sorry it came to this.
I'm not paying that tab!
It's a shame it came to this. We coulda had fun...
If I wanted a real challenge, I should have fought Tusk...
So you're the one Wukong is always going on and on about?
Your web has nothing on my thorns...
So much pride, so little talent.
You were the champion of the Omexe arena? Doesn't speak very highly of Centaurs.
There's only room for one agent of chaos on this battlefield...
No one tells me what to do!
I won't be your pawn!
Sorry hero.
Just accept your fate and die already!
Cute cogs. Do you mind if I take one?
You keenfolk are nothing without your toys!
You're the Warden of Icewrack? Please...
You're nothing but a two-bit talent that stumbled onto a title.
Tactician? Hardly.
All your little mind games didn't add up to a whole lot did they, Dark Seer?
Keep your hoogidy-boo away from me!
Shoulda looked after yourself instead of worrying about your friends...
Sweetie, your name is richly ironic.
I hate spirits.
You shoulda joined the Red Mist... At least then you'd learn how to fight.
I'm not meeting my end here!
My soul is stayin' right where it belongs...
Another do-gooder put in their place.
Your friends couldn't save ya.
Some huntress you are...
Your brothers would be disappointed in you...
You think a rock could ever catch me?
No one bars my path...
I'm takin' your little drum for my collection.
Shoulda stuck to your forge!
God you're old.
You'll never be as quick as me.
Sorry you won't make it to the family reunion.
I could smash your saccharine face over and over.
How well did that positive outlook help you?
Tell me your secrets!
I want the power you hold Enigma!
Some time lord you turned out to be...
I never feared the void.
I'll never get tired of doing that.
You're just a pawn of the gods, Huskar.
Everyone hates you, Invoker. Everyone.
You talk too much.
Lights out.
Two heads, no skill.
I'm gonna make a jaunty little hat out of you...
Where'd all that honor get you?
That mask will fetch a high price.
Fundamentals... I don't see what the big deal is...
Shiny.
You were supposed to go down with your ship...
Stonehall has blood on its hands.
I lived in Revtel long enough to know the difference between order and tyranny.
I'm a mischief maker... not a sadist.
You're a blight on this world, Leshrac!
Some power isn't worth the price, Lich.
You should be used to dyin' by now, Lich.
I'm not ending up like you!
Stay away from me!
Guess you're not that much of a bad girl after all.
All that bluster and you're just a sad little girl.
I heard of you Lion... you're a monster.
I'll take that arm for myself!
You should have kept to yourself.
At least you didn't die alone.
People don't change, Luna!
Stop peddling your little redemption story.
Selemene never should've chosen you.
You never stood a chance.
I'll bury you with the rest of your family.
I know just the person to move your horn.
Jex, when this is over remind me to go back for his horn.
Nice hair.
Eh. Sorry, snake lady.
Please don't be salty about the whole murder thing. You'll be back on your feet soon.
Sorry Meepo. When this is all over I'll buy you a beer, ok?
Selemene deserves better protectors.
You're not in my league, Mirana.
Shoulda hid as a tree.
Next time run away on your little cloud.
Your tricks can't stop me, Morphling...
You're a second rate elemental.
Song's over.
You're done singing.
You think trees are going to stop me?
I'm not afraid of the forest, Prophet.
Don't touch me!
Next time, try to use the scythe.
The night is my dominion.
No one hunts me.
Ugh. I hate bugs.
Better things than you have tried, Nyx.
It's unfortunate you picked the wrong side... you would have made a great henchman.
Just stop arguing with each other and die already!
Next time, worry about saving yourself.
Better luck next time, Omniknight.
Too easy.
I don't need to see the future. My victory is inevitable.
You never should have come here!
Go back where you're from!
All that bravado, but no real talent..
You're being used Mortred!
You think you're the first assassin to come for me?
All your gifts, and you squander them on heroism.
You think you can fool me?
At least you dreamed big.
You're just not good enough, Phoenix.
I warned you before. Stay out of my way!
I'm tired of you meddling in my business, Puck.
Sorry, butcher.
I hope you rot here.
You've gone too far, Pugna!
Go back to Oblivion!
Lady, you're a walking cliché.
You give the rest of us naughty girls a bad name.
I don't fear you, Razor.
Learn to use that whip better.
You made your choice Riki, and I made mine.
We could have been friends, Riki.
Give me that staff, Rubick
I want your father's secrets!
Stay down.
That's what you get for trying to sneak up on me.
Everything you offer has strings attached...
I'm not joining your little cult.
I'm not going to join your little collection...
Sorry, Shadow Fiend, today's not your day.
Professional courtesy only goes so far.
It was you or me Rhasta, I'm sorry.
I'm not going to the Tyler Estate!
You'll never take me, Silencer!
This is a mercy.
Stop talking.
Better death than Dark Reef.
Should have stayed in the Depths...
You couldn't hide forever...
Looks like you're not as good as you thought you were...
Die you little runt...
That gun was never gonna help ya...
I'm putting you to rest.
Good night, Spectre.
Try finesse next time.
You're just a charging brute.
All sound, no fury.
Shame you couldn't back up what you were saying.
That's the best you could do, Sven?
I was expecting more from you, Sven.
You're more annoying than I am.
I'm breaking your toys.
You think you could trap me?
You'll never outwit me, Lanaya.
Parlor tricks don't impress me, Terrorblade.
I'm haunted by Kunkka thanks to you!
Ehaha. That's all your armor can do?
I'm not some tree that'll stand still...
Your little machines are no match for Jex.
You think I'm scared of robots? You know how much time I spent in Iron Fog?
I don't care how big you get, you're not gonna stop me.
A little humility is good for ya, Tiny.
Leaving Roseleaf was a mistake.
You can't even save yourself.
You think a brute like you could stop me?
You're not half the man Bristleback is.
I'm gonna turn you into a nice coat.
You're repugnant.
I'm not going anywhere with you!
Just stay dead!
I'm not returning what I stole.
You were never gonna stop me.
You're second rate Ursa. Deal with it.
Vengeance gets you nowhere.
That's what you get when you take things too personal.
Your wards couldn't save you!
You never were going to win this fight.
I'm supposed to be scared of a little acid?
You're not a predator, you're a weed.
I won't go to the Narrow Maze!
Your magic isn't strong enough Warlock!
You thought that golem would protect you?
You don't control creation Weaver...
My life is my own Weaver, I'm not a piece of your tapestry.
Shut up already!
At least Drow would have put up a fight.
You forgot what you are...
You traded your power for a pen? Pathetic.
You're a poet not a fighter.
This isn't personal.
Sorry, doc.
I've seen what rulers like you are like... you deserved to die.
Death is too good for you Ostarion.
That's the best a god can do?
I always wanted to defeat a god.
I'm just getting started.
Just like Lorlin showed me...
It was inevitable...
Ohhh I love the sound of money...
I can take care of myself...
Cute horse. I'm going to take it.
You should have stayed incorporeal...
You think you can drag me to the Tyler Estate?!
You may have imprisoned the Ancients, but you'll never capture me...
Jex is going to tear your little pet apart.
My father sent you, didn't he!
You ride a pony. Adorable.
When are you Oglodi gonna learn...
Cute transformations aren't gonna save ya...
I'm gonna break your pretty little toy.
Let me help you with your sacrifice...
Let me show you how a real wisp does things.
What happened to you wasn't my fault!
They're going to fit your remains in that stupid hat of yours!
Make as many illusions as you want, I'll kill em all.
This is all your fault, Tidehunter!
I'll fly circles around you.
You won't take me!
Soo, the mist of Avernus... can I have some?
I like you. Every entrance you make is terribly dramatic.
I love your money.
Ya know, the best part of being your friend is that when I rob you. Who cares? You can make more.
You're not much of a people person are you?
I'm not sure if the shivers I'm feeling are nerves, or just being around you.
Heard you were Silencer's errand boy now? True?
Word is the Tyler Estate has you on retainer.
If you were so good at your job how did the Ancients escape?
Warden, your jurisdiction stops at the Mad Moon, right?
So Axe, you betrayed your own people... I can respect that.
Hey Axe, is Khan a last name, or more of a title thing?
Hey Bane, have you seen what they do to people in Iron Fog? It'd be great research for that nightmare thing you do.
So... Bane... You're scary.
I've been to Yama Raskav, awful place. Good on ya for leaving.
I'll be honest Batrider, I hate it when you talk, but I respect that you take care of your mount.
Look, he may be loyal, but I don't care what you say, that thing isn't a boar.
Take it from a lady. Lose the beard.
Sooo if I give you a list of enemies could you like, hunt them down for me?
I saw you years ago in Roseleaf, kept my distance though. Ya know, so I wouldn't get murdered.
Oh look. It's Gondar. You survived. Great.
I'm never going back to Revtel, Gondar. Try to force me and you're a dead man.
You got a flask on ya?
Tonight we're getting loaded right?
When this over whaddya say we go to the pub and pick a fight?
If you have the time, I'd love for you to give me some pointers on my right hook.
You know what I love about you? Donté hates you.
I don't suppose if I asked real nicely you'd make me a hammock?
I'm not tellin' ya something ya don't already know, but the Monkey King... Tchk. Not a fan.
So, how much is the purse you get for winning in Omexe?
If you ever want to move that championship belt for some quick gold, I know a guy.
You and me are gonna get along just fine.
I'm not trying to tell a Fundamental how to do their job, but you really need to step up your chaos game.
You gotta teach me that mind control trick.
Chen, I'm tellin ya, you and me could make a killing in White Spire.
You ever been to Quoidge? You'd fit right in.
I heard about you Clinkz. Your story really taught me why I should never try to be a hero.
You're not friends with Mazzie are you? I hate that little runt.
I don't know how close you are to Timbersaw, but if you care about his safety tell him to stay clear of Roseleaf.
Soo I don't suppose you could talk to Auroth and get her to let me take a peek at her treasure trove?
You friends with any Sapphire Archons? I have some, uh, issues that I would love to have smoothed out.
I'd love to pick your brain on how to rob Weeping Rose.
You're a tactician. What did you make of the Vhoul Rebellion?
You're a creepy little man, you know that?
I don't suppose I could keep you on retainer? I have a vested interest in cheating death.
So can you fly through walls? Cause if so you'd make a helluva second-story man.
I could listen to you talk for hours.
You're much more reasonable than Sorla.
You're the first Oglodi I met that isn't a raving murder machine.
Don't take it the wrong way, but I try not to traffic with demons.
So. Doom. Mm, that name is... descriptive.
Know of any good treasure we can steal when this is all over?
You ready to pick a fight, Davion?
How's Pudge and Slark doing?
I heard Windranger complaining about you being aloof and unfeeling... We should get along just fine.
You don't have a fifth brother hiding somewhere too, right?
I'd love to know what the four of you were like growing up.
We're gonna make em hate us.
Glad you're on my side.
So... You made creation... That's something.
You're not a whole barrel of laughs are ya.
You start the fire, and I'll fan the flames.
We're gonna get in trooouble.
You're like a children's book made flesh.
Marks like you are just so trusting. I love it.
The way you trapped that alchemist? Classic.
You're a fun one, Enigma.
So, Faceless Void... This is certainly the first time we've met.
Huh. I heard you looked like a lobster. I'm disappointed.
I don't get why everyone hates you. You seem lovely.
Come on... Let me fly that thing.
You won't see me willing to die for my people.
Ya know, I think I'll skip the Nothl Realm.
Just between you and me, I'm pretty sure Axe wants to beat you stupid.
You remind me of my tutors. I hated my tutors.
Whatcha think Jex, you want a roommate?
Awwww Jex, I think Io likes you.
You ready to have some fun, Jakiro?
You know in Revtel, Pyrexae is a great delicacy.
Juggernaut. Always so serious.
I wish I was the last of my kind.
Wow, you're old.
Keeper of the light... That job sounds... Boring.
Well hello, Captain.
Cute scar... How'd you get it?
Don't expect me to play by your rules, and, uh, we'll get along just fine.
Rix is gonna kill you.
The less you talk to me the better.
Let's just get this over with Leshrac.
So you're that cautionary tale Donté keeps harping at me about.
Cool skull.
Look I'm not trying to tell you how to live your life. But moisturize.
Please don't murder me.
I know a thing or two about hating family, Lina.
Your sister's not the enemy. It's your parents that drove you apart.
They say you're a hunted man. I can relate.
So long as you don't point your finger at me, we'll get along just fine.
Can I pet your bear?
So does your pet have a name? Spirit Bear is rather impersonal.
I can't place your accent, where ya from?
How's that penitent thing workin' out for ya?
I'm just trying to work this out. You're sad your family's dead?
Heard Slom was quite the place back in the day
If you die, can I have your horn?
You know what your horn is going for nowadays?
I heard a rumor of some gorgons being moved through Weeping Rose.
Don't be offended if I don't look at you.
Listen Meepo, I'm not saying the Jasper Circle wants to kill you. I'm just saying that they're losing faith you're going to pay them back.
When the battle's done you and me are going to White Spire to play the Couriers.
You don't actually trust Luna, do you?
Cute cat.
So you're the chatty little rodent man everyone's been talking about.
Now walk me through this: You have your staff. But you still have to buy your staff.
Never stop changing, Morphling.
I think it's great you keep reinventing yourself.
We're going to ruin their day.
Come on Siren, it's time to frustrate the hell outta people.
I'm more of a city girl meself.
I know you like making trees. I don't suppose you can add an addition to my little hollow?
You really need a new moniker. Pope of Pestilence isn't as intimidating as you think it is.
Ooh, you're an ugly lookin' bastard aren't ya?
We're going to own the night.
We'll hunt them all down.
You ever work with the Jasper Circle?
They'll never see us coming.
You'd make great hired muscle.
Hey Ogre, when this is all over I'd love to pick your brain about arson.
Oh, great. Another religious zealot.
So long as you keep me alive I'll put up with all your spiritual malarky.
You and I could make a killing Oracle.
Hey Oracle, I'm not going to die today, am I?
Look, I don't know if they have gold where you're from but in case they don't, the little metal coins laying around are useless. Just let me collect them.
Let's lock 'em down.
See Donté, I'm not all bad...
Don't get too excited... This partnership won't last long.
I don't think your little sorority is for me.
You really do whatever that list tells you to do?
Oh, what I wouldn't give to make more of me.
Aw, I don't have time for one of your lectures, Azwraith.
Listen, we all come back from the dead, I don't get what the big deal is.
Just let me pluck one feather. Please?
You're a chaotic little creature, Puck.
Strange bedfellows, eh Puck?
Quoidge is a lovely little town, Pudge.
You're a gentleman Pudge, don't let anyone tell you different.
You're a dangerous little man. I like that.
Be careful Pugna. If you burn down the world, there's nothing left to play with.
The boys are gonna love us.
We're gonna have some fuuuuunnnn.
Just promise me if I die you'll let me out of the Narrow Maze.
Wukong was talking a whole lotta trash about you being bad at your job.
You work with the Jasper Circle, right?
How's Lasan doing?
How's living in your father's shadow treating you?
Rubick, you're no enigma. You're a sad little boy looking for approval.
Not much of a people person are you?
If you're a pile of living sand, why are you stuck as an arachnid all the time?
I try not to get involved with demonic politics.
I don't want any of your gifts, demon.
Can we agree to leave my soul right where it is?
Father always warned me not to traffic with demons. So...
I like your hustle, Shaman.
We need to come up with a schedule for who gets to hit what city. Last time we overlapped it was trouble for both of us.
How's teaming up with Anti-Mage working out for you?
When the battle's over, we go our separate ways. Understood?
You're nothing but a puppet, bird man.
Your devotion is nauseating.
You don't belong here, Slardar.
Stick to the depths, Slardar. There's a lot of naughty things on the surface.
You gotta tell me about Dark Reef sometime.
The Monkey King is taking credit for your escape again.
Cover me, Sniper.
Nice to have you watching my back.
Other people might not understand you, but I do.
If you need anything, just wail.
I'll follow your lead, big guy.
Time to cause some trouble, eh Spirit Breaker?
You're a lot more fun than your brothers.
You seem game for a laugh.
Good on you for standing up for yourself.
Nice to have the knights of the Vigil on my side for a change.
You boys are trouble.
Come on, boys. Let's make their lives hell.
Tell me you're not still hung up on Yurnero.
Ready to lay some traps?
So what should I call you? Terrorblade doesn't exactly roll off the tongue.
How'd you escape the Foulfell?
I still have dreams of that day at sea, Tidehunter.
This isn't a partnership, Tidehunter. Never forget that.
You're absolutely mad, you know that?
You better not come near my hollow.
Word of advice... Never visit Iron Fog.
I've been around machines my whole life. They don't impress me.
Hey little fella.
I can't wait to watch you become the bruiser you're meant to be.
You ready to work together?
I admire what you did in Roseleaf. I mean, it was stupid, but admirable.
Ready to hurt some people.
Let's go make a mess.
So. Tusk. I heard Bristleback beat you stupid.
Both sides say they won that fight, but I know who I believe.
Wow, you're big.
Please don't eat me.
I'm just saying if you don't want your tomb robbed, don't put stuff in it that people want to steal.
Just remember we're on the same side, ok.
You don't seem particularly cuddly.
Anyone ever mistake you for Lone Druid's pet?
I'd be careful about being driven by revenge. It makes you predictable.
You don't have a problem with me, right?
You're a nasty little creature.
Try not to drip on me.
You're not a whole lot of fun to be around, Viper.
